title: Sysmon RDP Lateral Movement
description: Detects outbound RDP connections (port 3389) from unusual processes. While RDP is commonly used for administration, connections from non-standard processes may indicate lateral movement.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Destination Port' = 3389 and Initiated = 'true') and (('Process Name' like '*\cmd.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\powershell.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\wscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\mstsc.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\tscon.exe')))
